name: Segndo Caldena
bio: With over 20 years of dedicated experience in the automotive detailing industry, Segundo Caldena, has built a reputation for unparalleled precision and excellence. Specializing in high-end paint correction and advanced surface protection, Segundo treats every vehicle with a master’s touch—ensuring a showroom finish that exceeds even the most demanding client expectations. Driven by a lifelong passion for automotive perfection, Segundo continues to set the standard for quality and care in the local community.
excerpt: Nearly 20 years of dedicated experience in the automotive detailing industry.
